gap_statement: The biochemical activity of CFAP300 is unknown. It is unresolved whether it acts as a chaperone/co-chaperone, a scaffold, or an adaptor; what its client/substrate is; and whether it acts at one common step upstream of both dynein arm types or in parallel ODA- and IDA-specific steps.

The specific GEF that activates RAB9A on late endosomes and the GAP that inactivates it have not been definitively identified, so how the RAB9A nucleotide switch is spatially and temporally controlled is unresolved.
